description_long: This is a two-story red house with a prominent gable roof and white trim outlining the roof edges and windows. The house features a fenced yard, with the fence painted white and enclosing the front and one side of the property. The front facade has a large, central entryway with a brown door and a wide window above, flanked by two smaller windows. The roof is dark gray, with a small chimney visible near the rear. The windows are outlined in white and have a yellowish tint, suggesting either tinted glass or drawn curtains. The overall design is simple yet classic, with clean lines and a symmetrical appearance.
description: A red two-story house with a gable roof, white trim, and a fenced yard. The facade features a central entryway, large windows, and a small chimney.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main gable roof, two garage-like doors, and the white fence extending from the house.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, large central window, and the fenced yard directly in front.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the secondary gable, a long window, and the fence enclosing the side yard.
description_view_3: Rear view with a single large window and the back portion of the fence visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large central windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a single door, no porch, and a wide overhanging gable above
